---
title: "135: WAB and Quads"
date: "2025-03-15"
categories:
  - labeller
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Code"
editor: visual

---

### Load data

```{r load-data, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(rlang)
library(cbbplotR)
options(chromote.headless = "new")

# this data is used in the evidence app, saving as a csv for static generation 
# https://github.com/gallochris/evdev-byc/blob/main/data/college-basketball/wab_logs.R

team_sched_by_wab <- readr::read_csv("wabstick.csv")

bub_teams <- c("North Carolina", "Indiana", "Texas", "Xavier", "Boise St.", "UC Irvine") 

wabstick <- team_sched_by_wab |> 
  dplyr::group_by(team) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
    total_wab = round(sum(wab_result), 2),
    wins = sum(result == "W"),
    loss = sum(result == "L"),
    q1_wins = sum(result == "W" & quad == "Q1"),
    q1_loss = sum(result == "L" & quad == "Q1"),
    q2_wins = sum(result == "W" & quad == "Q2"),
    q2_loss = sum(result == "L" & quad == "Q2"),
    q3_wins = sum(result == "W" & quad == "Q3"),
    q3_loss = sum(result == "L" & quad == "Q3"),
    q4_wins = sum(result == "W" & quad == "Q4"),
    q4_loss = sum(result == "L" & quad == "Q4")
  ) |>  
  dplyr::ungroup() |>  
# bubble teams
  dplyr::filter(team %in% bub_teams) |>
  dplyr::group_by(team) |>
  dplyr::summarize(
    total_wab = dplyr::first(total_wab),
    wins = dplyr::first(wins),
    loss = dplyr::first(loss),
    q1_wins = dplyr::first(q1_wins),
    q1_loss = dplyr::first(q1_loss),
    q2_wins = dplyr::first(q2_wins),
    q2_loss = dplyr::first(q2_loss),
    q3_wins = dplyr::first(q3_wins),
    q3_loss = dplyr::first(q3_loss),
    q4_wins = dplyr::first(q4_wins),
    q4_loss = dplyr::first(q4_loss),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(desc(total_wab)) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    safe_team_id = paste0("team", dplyr::row_number())
  ) |>
  dplyr::right_join(
    team_sched_by_wab |> 
      dplyr::filter(team %in% bub_teams),
    by = "team"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    facet_label = safe_team_id,
    team_label = paste0(
      team, ": <b>", wins, "-", loss, "</b> | ",
      "<span style='color:", ifelse(total_wab > 0, "#1a9850", "#c51b7d"), ";'>",
      sprintf("%.2f", total_wab), " WAB</span>"
    ),
    quad_records = paste0(
      "<span style='font-size:7.5pt;'>Q1: ", q1_wins, "-", q1_loss,
      " | Q2: ", q2_wins, "-", q2_loss,
      " | Q3: ", q3_wins, "-", q3_loss,
      " | Q4: ", q4_wins, "-", q4_loss, "</span>"
    )
  )


#----
net_wab_data <- readr::read_csv("net_wab.csv")
```

### WABStick

```{r wabstick-plot, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

wabstick |> 
  ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(
    x = wab_opp, 
    y = wab, 
    color = factor(wab > 0)
  )) +
  ggplot2::geom_segment(ggplot2::aes(xend = wab_opp, yend = 0), 
                        linewidth = 0.75, alpha = 0.6) +
  ggplot2::geom_point(ggplot2::aes(shape = quad), 
                      size = 1.25, fill = "white", 
                      stroke = 0.8) +
  ggplot2::scale_shape_manual(
    name = "Quadrant",
    values = c("Q1" = 21, "Q2" = 22, 
               "Q3" = 23, "Q4" = 24)
  ) +
  ggplot2::scale_color_manual(
    values = c("#c51b7d", "#1a9850"),
    guide = "none"
  ) +  
  ggplot2::scale_x_reverse(
    limits = c(1, 0), 
    breaks = seq(1, 0, by = -0.25), 
    labels = scales::label_percent(accuracy = 1),
    expand = c(0.02, 0.02)
  ) +  
  ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(-1, 1), 
    breaks = seq(-1, 1, by = 0.25),
    labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 0.01),  # Smaller labels
    expand = c(0.02, 0.02)
  ) + 
  ggplot2::facet_wrap(
    ~ facet_label,
    nrow = 3, 
    ncol = 2,
    labeller = ggplot2::labeller(facet_label = function(x) {

      team_labels <- wabstick |>  
        dplyr::distinct(facet_label, team_label, quad_records) |>
        dplyr::mutate(quad_team_label = 
                        paste0(team_label, "<br>", 
                               quad_records)) |> 
        dplyr::pull(quad_team_label, name = facet_label)
      
      return(team_labels[x])
    })
  ) +
  ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6) +  
  ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = 0.50, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.6) +  
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = "WABStick  \nRésumé Comparison of Bubble Teams",
    x = "<--- Harder Games | Easier Games --->",
    y = "WAB",
    caption = "Data via barttorvik.com | Viz by Chris at Bless your Chart & Ryan at Fifth Factor"
  ) +
  hrbrthemes::theme_ipsum_rc() +
  ggplot2::theme(
    plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(
      hjust = 0.5,
      size = 16,
      family = "Roboto Condensed"
    ),
    strip.text = ggtext::element_markdown(
      size = 8.5, 
      face = "bold", 
    ), 
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.title = ggplot2::element_text(size = 8.5),
    legend.text = ggplot2::element_text(size = 8),
    legend.key.size = ggplot2::unit(0.8, "lines"),
    axis.title.x = ggplot2::element_text(size = 8.5, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 8.5),
    axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(size = 6.5, 
                                        family = "Roboto Condensed"),
    axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 6.5, family = "Roboto Condensed"),
    plot.caption = ggplot2::element_text(size = 7, face = "plain"),
    panel.grid.major = ggplot2::element_blank(),  
    panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_line(color = "gray90", size = 0.25),
    panel.spacing = ggplot2::unit(1, "lines")
  ) -> wb_plot


ggplot2::ggsave(
  "wabstick_plot.png",
  wb_plot,
  h = 9.5,
  w = 7.5,
  bg = "white",
  dpi = 600,
  type = 'cairo'
)

wb_plot 

```

### 

### WAB by Quadrant

```{r wab-quad }

nw_tbl <- net_wab_data |> 
  dplyr::filter(team %in% bub_teams) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
    record = paste0(wins, "-", losses),
    q1_record = paste0(q1_win, "-", q1_loss),
    q2_record = paste0(q2_win, "-", q2_loss),
    q3_record = paste0(q3_win, "-", q3_loss),
    q4_record = paste0(q4_win, "-", q4_loss)
  ) |> 
  dplyr::select(
    team, total, record, quad_1, q1_record, 
    quad_2, q2_record, 
    quad_3, q3_record, 
    quad_4, q4_record, 
  ) 

custom_header <-glue::glue(
  "<div style='display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;'>
      <div>
       <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/redesign/assets/img/icons/ESPN-icon-basketball.png'
       style='height: 40px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
     <div style='flex-grow:1; margin-left: 30px; margin-right: 30px'>
       <span style='display: block; font-weight: bold; text-align: center; font-size: 24px;'>Bubble Teams: WAB by Quadrant</span>
       <span style='font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; display: block; text-align: center;'>Shows the WAB earned by games played in each quadrant.</span>
     </div>
     <div>
       <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/redesign/assets/img/icons/ESPN-icon-basketball.png'
       style='height: 40px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
   </div>
  <br>"
)



net_tbl <- nw_tbl |> 
  cbbplotR::gt_cbb_teams(team, team) |> 
  dplyr::arrange(-total) |> 
  gt::gt() |>
  gtUtils::gt_theme_gtutils() |> 
  gt::fmt_markdown(team) |>
  gt::cols_align(team, align = "left") |>
  gtExtras::gt_merge_stack(
    col1 = total,
    col2 = record,
        palette = c("black", "#333333")
  ) |> 
  gtExtras::gt_merge_stack(
    col1 = quad_1,
    col2 = q1_record,
    palette = c("black", "#333333")
  ) |> 
gtExtras::gt_merge_stack(
  col1 = quad_2,
  col2 = q2_record,
  palette = c("black", "#333333")
) |> 
gtExtras::gt_merge_stack(
  col1 = quad_3,
  col2 = q3_record,
  palette = c("black", "#333333")
) |> 
gtExtras::gt_merge_stack(
  col1 = quad_4,
  col2 = q4_record,
  palette = c("black", "#333333")
) |> 
  gtUtils::gt_column_subheaders(
    total = list(heading = "WAB", subtitle = "Overall Record"),
    quad_1 = list(heading = "Quad 1", subtitle = "WAB + Record"),
    quad_2 = list(heading = "Quad 2", subtitle = "WAB + Record"),
    quad_3 = list(heading = "Quad 3", subtitle = "WAB + Record"),
    quad_4 = list(heading = "Quad 4", subtitle = "WAB + Record"),
    heading_color = "black",
    subtitle_color = "gray"
  ) |> 
    gt::cols_label(
    team = ""
  ) |> 
    gtUtils::gt_border_grid(color = "black",
                          weight = 0.5,
                          include_labels = FALSE) |> 
  gtExtras::gt_add_divider(
    columns = c(team),
    sides = "right",
    color = "black"
  ) |> 
  gt::data_color(
    columns = c(total, quad_1, quad_2, quad_3, quad_4),
    direction = c("column"),
    method = c("numeric"),
    palette = c("#d7191c", "#fdae61", 
                "#ffffbf", "#a6d96a", 
                "#1a9641"),
    alpha = 0.6
  ) |> 
  gt::tab_header(title = gt::html(custom_header)) |>
  gt::tab_source_note(
    source_note =
      gt::html(
        "<hr>Data via barttorvik.com | theme via {gtUtils} <br>
        Quadrants are defined by the NCAA's NET rankings. WAB determined using data from barttorvik.com<br>
        <hr><b>Table by Chris at Bless your chart | data through March 15 games</b>"
      )
  ) |>
  gtUtils::gt_border_bars_bottom(c("#636363", "#969696", "#cccccc")) |> 
  gt::tab_options(table.width = gt::px(675)) |>
  gt::tab_style(
    locations = gt::cells_source_notes(),
    style = gt::cell_text(
      font = gt::google_font("Signika Negative"),
      size = gt::px(11.5),
      weight = 250
    )
  ) |> 
  gt::tab_style(
    style = list(
      gt::cell_text(font = gt::google_font("Signika Negative"),
                    size = gt::px(14)
      )
    ),
    locations = gt::cells_body(
      rows = gt::everything(),
      columns = gt::everything()
    )
  )


gtUtils::gt_save_crop(
  net_tbl,
  file = "net_tbl.png",
  whitespace = 40,
  bg = "#FFFDF5"
)

net_tbl

```
